pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py exact matches
Task description and verifier.py exact matches

privileged_info_summary: The task asks to configure a new Domain Controller in ADAudit Plus with synthetic data. The target URL is 'https://localhost:8081' (although HTTP 'http://localhost:8081' works per setup scripts). The initial admin login credentials claimed in the task description ('admin'/'admin') are incorrect; the environment setup scripts (install_adaudit_plus.ps1) automatically change the initial password to 'Admin@2024' before the task begins. Furthermore, the task's programmatic verification is broken because the 'setup_task.ps1' and 'export_result.ps1' hook scripts are missing from the environment, meaning the 'task_result.json' required by the verifier is never generated.
